findingDetails.evidence: Spec lists files under `.opencode/skills/deep-improvement/...` and command `.opencode/commands/deep/start-model-benchmark-loop.md`. `ls` shows neither path exists; actual files are under `.opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-improvement/` and the command is `model-benchmark.md`.
findingDetails.why: Documentation/spec is not traceable to the real code an operator must run.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update the spec's file tables and command references to the actual paths, or create symlinks/aliases where the spec claims they live.

title: Reviewer seed fixtures are not in any shipped profile

findingDetails.evidence: Default profile's `fixtures` array is `["fixture-baseline", "fixture-improved", "fixture-edge"]`. No profile in `benchmark-profiles/` references any `reviewer-*.json` fixture. Running `reviewer-scorer.cjs` against the default profile yields `fixtures: 0`.
findingDetails.why: The benchmark cannot run the documented seed fixtures out-of-the-box; they are present on disk but unreachable through the normal profile-driven path.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a shipped reviewer profile (e.g., `reviewer-regression.json`) listing the four `reviewer-*.json` fixtures, and reference it in the command examples.

findingDetails.evidence: `const VALID_SCORERS = new Set(['pattern', '5dim']);` and lines 463-466 fall back any other `--scorer` value to `pattern` with a stderr warning.
findingDetails.why: A user invoking the default Lane B runner with `--scorer reviewer` gets pattern scoring instead of reviewer scoring, silently.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add `reviewer` to `VALID_SCORERS` and route reviewer-shaped fixtures to `reviewer-scorer.cjs`, or clearly document that reviewer scoring must use the command/YAML path.

title: MB-R01 manual-testing scenario file is missing

findingDetails.evidence: Root playbook references `MB-R01 | Reviewer Prompt Regression Fixtures` and says to add a per-feature file under `09--model-benchmark-mode/`. The directory contains only MB-038..MB-042 files; no MB-R01 file exists.
findingDetails.why: The claimed manual-testing coverage for reviewer fixtures is not present, so the playbook cannot be executed as documented.
findingDetails.recommendation: Create `09--model-benchmark-mode/reviewer-prompt-regression-fixtures.md` (or equivalent) with the MB-R01 execution contract, commands, and expected signals.
